name: machinen
description: Shows code origin and decisions when hovering over //? in code

machinen.overrideCursorCompletions.description: When true, this extension's completions will take precedence when //? pattern is detected. Note: You may need to disable 'editor.inlineSuggest.enabled' or Cursor's completions separately.

machinen.apiUrl.description: The base URL for the Machinen API

machinen.apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Machinen API
